headline: TechnipFMC to Speak at J.P. Morgan 2026 Natural Resources Conference
summary: NEWCASTLE & HOUSTON, June 18, 2026--TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) announced today that Doug Pferdehirt, Chair and Chief Executive Officer, will speak at the J.P. Morgan 2026 Natural Resources Conference: An Energy, Power, Renewables & Mining Event on Wednesday, June 24, 2026, at 8:35 a.m. ET in New York, NY.

headline: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory
summary: (Bloomberg) -- It was fight night on the White House lawn. Beneath a great steel canopy nicknamed "the Claw," Justin Gaethje did a backflip off the caged ring in the center of the South Lawn after winning the Ultimate Fighting Championship title card. headline: Ares Commercial Real Estate (ACRE) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift On Split Analyst Views
summary: Ares Commercial Real Estate is back in focus as analysts refresh their models and set a new fair value price target of US$5.30 per share, compared with prior figures around US$5.25 and US$5.50. This shift sits alongside a split set of Street opinions, with some analysts pointing to book value support and dividend stability, while others emphasize ongoing credit resolution risk and recent cuts from earlier targets such as US$6 and the US$0.50 move cited by JPMorgan. As you read on, you will...

headline: Travis Perkins (LSE:TPK) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower After Analyst Target Cuts
summary: The fair value estimate for Travis Perkins has been nudged lower from £6.62 to £6.55, a shift that aligns with recent trims to analyst price targets in the mid £6 range. These changes sit alongside moves such as JPMorgan’s adjustment to £6.30, underscoring a more cautious tone on how much investors might pay for the stock while ratings like Equal Weight and Overweight remain in place. Read on to see what this evolving target range means for how you track the Travis Perkins story from...
